RawMarkdown:
## Scott Galloway
Email: scott.galloway@gmail.com
Phone: 07498479614 (please email in the first instance)
Blog: mostlylucid.net
GitHub: github.com/scottgal/mostlylucidweb
## Professional Summary
From Perl CGI scripts to cloud platforms, I’ve spent over two decades building and running software that holds up under pressure. I’ve worked across ASP, .NET, and today’s Core/Azure/Kubernetes stack, leading teams and reworking legacy systems along the way. I add AI when it’s useful, not because it’s trendy. The thread through it all is simple: make things work properly and make them last.
## Core Competencies
Technology Leadership: CTO, Engineering Management, Agile/Scrum, Cross-functional Collaboration, Team Building, Mentorship, Stakeholder Communication
Software Development: ASP.NET Core, .NET Framework / .NET 6/7/8/9, C#, RESTful APIs, Microservices Architecture, Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
Cloud Infrastructure: Microsoft Azure, Azure Functions, Azure DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes, Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC), Bicep, CI/CD Pipelines
AI & Data Engineering: ML.NET, scikit-learn, LLMs, Natural Language Processing (NLP), EasyNMT, Vector Embeddings, OpenAI, Azure AI Services, orchestration of LLM driven RAG pipelines.
Frontend Engineering: HTMX, Alpine.js, React, Vue.js, Blazor, Tailwind CSS, Responsive Design
Database Technologies: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Cosmos DB, MongoDB, OpenSearch, RavenDB
Tools & Project Management: Jira, Azure Boards, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Trello
## Professional Experience
### mostlylucid limited | Freelance Consultant / CTO / Lead Developer
Jan 2012 – Present | Remote
Delivered dozens of client solutions across fintech, healthcare, and ecommerce using JavaScript, .NET Core, Azure, and containerized architectures.
Developed and operated a developer bootcamp with 200+ graduates and a 90%+ placement rate.
Migrated legacy monoliths to cloud-native architectures, cutting infrastructure costs by 50% and improving time-to-deploy by 80% and reducing runtime errors by >90% in many instances.
Designed and deployed ML-based recommendation and lead generation systems using Azure OpenAI and vector embeddings.
Over the years I’ve worked with various companies & agencies worldwide on a contract basis including
Lead Architect / Developer for Major Asian Airline developing a novel Knockout & ASP.NET MVC based booking system
R&D Developer with an insurance company developing low level socket system using .NET on Azure for telemetry tracking and device development
Research Systems Architect on a UK Government National Security project on distributed computing and management of said systems.
Technical / Development consultant for 8  UK and international charities.
### ZenChef Ltd | Lead Contract Developer
Oct 2024 – Present | Remote
Migrated large, distributed legacy system to .NET 8, reducing Azure spend & improving reliability.
Conducted performance optimization and load testing using Application Insights and custom telemetry.
Supplied rapid support to a complex microservices and event driven system.
### Very Jane Ltd | Senior Backend Developer
Apr 2024 – Aug 2024 | Remote
Led backend development of scalable ecommerce modules including Stripe Connect and Hyperwallet integrations.
Bootstrapped the new platform from scratch, adding realistic test data for customer product import and ensuring high reliability with customer delivered data.
### Seamcor Ltd | Head of Engineering (Contract)
Dec 2022 – Apr 2024 | Remote
Managed a team of 10+ engineers to re-architect an enterprise-grade production management system.
Integrated Docker Compose and OpenSearch, providing powerful reporting and search functionality along with enabling customer specific deployments.
Completely redesigned the system to allow both cloud native and low cost on premises installs with OpenSearch, Postgres etc.
### GBG Plc (Loqate) | Lead Engineer
Aug 2022 – Nov 2022 | Remote
Architected a high-performance global address validation system using .NET 6 microservices and Kubernetes.
Implemented extensive testing infrastructure (using K6) to allow the rapid testing of changes and improvements leading to an 80% reduction in the development cadence.
### WCOM AB | Lead Developer (Contract)
Oct 2021 – May 2022 | Remote
Developed Blazor Server applications with Azure Functions and SignalR for real-time collaboration tools.
Delivered screen mirroring and IPC modules using a WPF application improving usability in logistics and remote environments.
### H3Space Ltd | Lead Engineer
Jun 2021 – Sep 2021 | Remote
Designed backend cloud architecture for Unity-based SaaS platform with React and GraphQL.
Hired and led a global dev team to MVP delivery within 90 days.
### Huozhi Ltd | Technical Consultant / Dev Lead
Jun 2018 – Mar 2020 | Remote
Modernized fintech platform, implementing performance profiling and API scalability improvements.
Led distributed team using Scrum and CI/CD practices to deliver biweekly releases.
### Interactive Reporting Ltd | Lead Developer (Contract)
Dec 2015 – Jun 2021 | Remote
Developed a cross-platform reporting engine using ASP.NET MVC and WPF.
Integrated multi-database support (SQL Server, MySQL, SQLite) for analytics workloads.
### Dell | Development Lead
Jan 2011 – Jul 2011 | Glasgow, UK
Architected an internal machine provisioning platform with ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server, reducing setup time by 70%.
### Microsoft Corp. | Program Manager II
Jan 2007 – Oct 2009 | Redmond, WA
Oversaw ASP.NET release planning and cross-functional coordination
Drove the security platform underlying Project Server.
Championed new security infrastructure design, improving compliance for enterprise deployments.
### Microsoft Ltd. | Application Development Consultant II
Jun 2005 – Jan 2007 | Reading, UK
Conducted enterprise performance audits and delivered architecture improvement plans to FTSE 100 clients.
StormID | Lead Developer
Feb 2003 – Jun 2005 | Edinburgh, UK
Delivered bespoke  CMS and ecommerce solutions using .NET and SQL Server under fast-paced agency timelines.
## Education
University of Stirling – BSc (Hons) Psychology
Stirling, Scotland, UK
